meta.question: Find any L3 APT requirments that currently lack a satisify or verify link.
meta.finalAnswer:
Found 28 L3 APT requirements that currently lack satisfy or verify links:

1. 100Hz focus mode
2. APS Maintainability
3. APS Metric Standardization
4. Accommodate LOWFS
5. CCD Full Read Out Rate
6. CCD ROI Read Out Rate
7. Common Requirements
8. Complete loss of power
9. Coolant Pressure
10. Coolant Temperatures
11. FOV
12. Glycol used at Nasmyth
13. High signal exposures
14. Image quality
15. Low signal exposures
16. Mass Allocation
17. Max. Pressure Drop of Coolant
18. Nighttime power to air inside the Enclosure
19. Nighttime power to water/glycol inside the Enclosure
20. OFF to Standby in 24 hours

(Plus 8 more requirements truncated in results)

These requirements are located in the L3 APT Requirements package and have no outgoing or incoming satisfy/verify dependency relationships.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), "l3") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), "apt"))
  ?req rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found L3 APT related elements but they are packages/views, not actual requirements. Need to explore the L3 APT Requirements package to find the actual tmt:requirement elements inside it.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3 APT Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: The package search returned empty. Need to explore the structure of the L3 APT Requirements package using its URI directly to find what properties it has and what elements it contains.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop ?value WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::APS::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::Requirements::04%2520APS%2520L3%2520Requirements::L3%2520APT%2520Requirements> ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found that the L3 APT Requirements package contains tmt:requirement elements (like FOV, Nighttime power, Coolant Temperatures, Plate scale, CCD Full Read Out Rate) and dependencies. Now I need to find all tmt:requirement elements in this package and check which ones lack satisfy or verify links.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?req ?name WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::APS::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::Requirements::04%2520APS%2520L3%2520Requirements::L3%2520APT%2520Requirements> vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?req .
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
}
ORDER BY ?name

request.reason: The query returned empty even though we saw tmt:requirement elements in the previous result. The issue might be with the rdf:type check. Let me explore what type the requirement elements actually have by querying one directly.

The rdf:type query returned empty for a known tmt:requirement element. This suggests the type might be encoded differently. Let me explore all properties of this requirement element to understand its structure.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop ?value WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/tmt%20requirement/TMT::Project::Work%20Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%20and%20Phasing%20System::Systems%20Engineering::01%20Components::Operational::APS::Black%20Box%20Specification::Requirements::04%20APS%20L3%20Requirements::L3%20APT%20Requirements::FOV> ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: The direct URI query returns empty, which suggests the URI might need different encoding or the element might be accessed differently. Let me try a broader search for all tmt:requirement elements with L3 APT in their qualified name.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?req ?name ?qname WHERE {
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qname .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?qname)), "l3") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?qname)), "apt") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?qname)), "requirement"))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found many L3 APT requirements (tmt:requirement type based on URI pattern). Now I need to check which of these requirements lack satisfy or verify links. I'll query for requirements that don't have outgoing satisfy or verify dependencies.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?req ?name WHERE {
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qname .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?qname)), "l3") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?qname)), "apt") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?qname)), "requirement"))
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?req vocab:Dependency_supplier ?supplier . })
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?req vocab:Dependency_client ?client . })
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?dep vocab:Dependency_supplier ?req . })
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?req . })
}
ORDER BY ?name

request.reason: The query returned 35 results but includes non-requirement elements (packages, views, appendixviews). I need to filter to only tmt:requirement elements by checking the URI pattern. Also, I should verify the satisfy/verify relationship detection is correct - these relationships might use specific predicates like vocab:satisfy or vocab:verify.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?req ?name WHERE {
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qname .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?req), "tmt%20requirement"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?qname)), "l3") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?qname)), "apt"))
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?req vocab:Dependency_supplier ?supplier . })
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?req vocab:Dependency_client ?client . })
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?dep vocab:Dependency_supplier ?req . })
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?req . })
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?req vocab:satisfy ?s . })
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?req vocab:verify ?v . })
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?dep vocab:satisfy ?req . })
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?dep vocab:verify ?req . })
}
ORDER BY ?name

request.reason: Found 28 L3 APT requirements that lack satisfy or verify links. The query correctly filters for tmt:requirement elements in the L3 APT Requirements package and excludes those with any Dependency_supplier, Dependency_client, satisfy, or verify relationships. The results show specific requirement names like FOV, Image quality, CCD Full Read Out Rate, etc.
